body.title: Counterparty risk assessment — ACME Corp (link-shared)

data_refs.description: Full assessment payload, held in the producer's erasable system of record under its own ACLs.

body.summary: private + audience worked example (RFC-ACDP-0002 §7, RFC-ACDP-0005 §2.5.5): audit-bot, listed in audience, CAN retrieve this context by its ctx_id but can NEVER discover it via keyword search or the derived_from filter — the ctx_id must be delivered out-of-band (a message, or a discoverable pointer context). An audience member that searches, finds nothing, and concludes the context does not exist is the documented failure mode; for cohort discoverability use visibility: restricted instead. See docs/integration-guide.md § Sharing a private context with a named audience.
